title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell describes a shift in software engineering where AI agents handle most code generation, with engineers transitioning to agent management. Cursor's data show 30% of PRs fully agent-developed and enterprise AI-generated code rising from 15% to 75% in one year.
